extraction.one_line_summary: WELLENS Tim won uphill finish after pinch-point crash 1.1km out fractured peloton, outsprinting Woods and G.Bennett on final grind
tactical_patterns: Pinch-point crash at 1.1km created selection before official climb started, rewarding front positioning over pure climbing legs.
KOM jersey holder Battaglin contested intermediate climb against Frapporti to secure points gap, ignoring breakaway cooperation dynamics.
Breakaway caught inside final 2km despite uphill finish, suggesting teams misjudged power balance or intentionally delayed chase.

rider_signals.WELLENS Tim: positive: Won uphill finish against recognized climbers Bennett/Woods/Yates, suggesting stronger punch than classification indicates
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: positive: Pink jersey limited losses on uphill finish after late-race pinch crash, positioning better than expected
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: Failed to capitalize on uphill finish despite being perfectly positioned, Bennett dragging him forward
rider_signals.BENNETT George: neutral: Attacked early on final climb but lacked finishing speed, perhaps testing form rather than genuine winning move
rider_signals.BATTAGLIN Enrico: positive: Tactically contested intermediate KOM against breakaway companion, prioritizing jersey over cooperation
